body.title: announce/manifest.py — Manifest + ToolBinding/ChannelSubscription/StateRef/ACL dataclasses
body.result: Manifest + ToolBinding/ChannelSubscription/StateRef/ACL dataclasses at announce/manifest.py. etag() SHA-256 helper for cache-invalidation. agent_datacenter commit a3caa2d.
body.description:
Define the dynamic manifest types per § 5.1: Manifest holds manifest_id, agent_id, instance_n, profile_etag, registry_etag, tool_bindings (list[ToolBinding]), channel_subscriptions (list[ChannelSubscription]), state_refs (list[StateRef]), acl (list[ACL]). ToolBinding = name + address + capabilities. ChannelSubscription = name + address + mode. StateRef = kind + address (Igor-only). ACL = role + permissions.

**Affected files:** /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/announce/manifest.py (NEW)
**Design rules:** dataclass-as-wire-shape, etag-driven-cache-keys
**Scope boundary:** in — Manifest + 4 sub-dataclasses, manifest_id derivation (uuid4 per assembly), to_dict/from_dict; out — assembly logic (broker.py owns), inotify/invalidation (slice 3)
**Test plan:** test_manifest_to_dict_includes_all_fields, test_manifest_id_unique_per_call, test_state_refs_optional (CC has none, Igor has them)
